sea_serpent.title: Find and kill a Sea Serpent (Ice & Fire — spawns in Deep Ocean biomes, requires Drowned World scroll)

subtitle.text: Before dragons ruled the sky, they ruled the sea.

description: The Ice & Fire Sea Serpent is a massive aquatic predator.
It spawns in Deep Ocean biomes.
It requires the Drowned World scroll before it can be damaged.
Sea Serpent Scales drop on kill.
They are crafting materials for Ice & Fire armor and items.
The sea serpent heart is a drop with brewing uses.
The Cold Civilization's lore connects to ice serpents.
The Cold Eye — from Frostmaw's chain — comes from ice, not sea.
But both are remnants of civilizations that mastered cold.
Ice & Fire creatures are part of the same inherited world.
